stemHtml: What is true about the time needed for the cones and rods to adapt to darkness?

options.a: It takes about the same time for cones and rods.
options.b: It takes 20-30 minutes or longer for the cones.
options.c: It takes 20-30 minutes or longer for the rods.
options.d: It takes 3-7 minutes for the rods to adapt.
